prompt: 在 audit log 列表页面，支持按时间戳排序（点击列头升序/降序切换），默认降序

assertions.text: Produces a structured impact assessment (identifies impact level and risk level)
Correctly classifies as L1/Low (UI-only, pure addition)
Decides to auto-approve (not pause for review)
Plans to create or update a feature doc with acceptance criteria
Includes a test plan (at minimum E2E tests)
Plans to update test-map.json for new/changed files
Includes a final verification step (full test suite run)
